news.t: Multisector Bond ETF FUSI Gets 5-Star Rating From Morningstar

overview.description: The American Century Multisector Floating Income ETF (FUSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively manages a global bond portfolio of primarily investment grade, floating rate securities. FUSI was launched on Mar 14, 2023 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Multisector Bond ETF FUSI Gets 5-Star Rating From Morningstar
data.text: Clients may love the relative safety of cash, but many advisors know those assets could do more. A multisector bond approach for example, offers plenty of rewards for those willing to dive in.
